title: All Of The Analog Horror - AOTAH MC
description: Explore a world, you think you are alone, BUT YOU ARE NOT ALONE, he is watching.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e41521f41e9f61a1447390d4bf4b2a964998bde3.jpeg)
# THANK YOU FOR 1K DOWNLOADS!!
# ALL OF THE ANALOG HORROR
(noscriptfound.error is the original name of the modpack)

Reality Has Crashed — No Script Found

Description
The system failed. The moon vanished. Something screeches just beyond sight.
NoScriptFound.error isn’t just a modpack — it’s a break in reality itself.

This experience combines the unsettling unpredictability of The Broken Script — where events, anomalies, and reality-bending glitches are the norm — with the looming dread of no_moon.jar, a world slowly unraveling as the moon fades into nothingness. Underneath it all lies an eerie grid of whispers and static, an unseen Circuit of signals begging to be decoded… and you are Alone.

Nothing behaves normally. Night never feels safe. And every glitch could be a clue — or a threat.

🎮 Core Features

Dynamic Reality Glitches
Expect unpredictable events and disturbances that defy logic and rewrite your environment.

Fading Moon & Rising Dread
With each night darker than the last, the world shifts, threats grow stronger, and fear becomes an ecosystem.

The Circuit Beneath
Hidden signals, patterns, and coded anomalies lurk in the world’s data — piece them together to understand what went wrong.

Alone in the Dark
Solitude isn’t peaceful here. Every silent moment feels like something watching… waiting.

Emergent ARG Mystery
No linear story. No guide. Your path unfolds through observation, interpretation, and survival.

🎯 Your Objective

Survive the corruption.
Decode the broken signals.
Uncover why the script failed… and what created the Circuit that now pulses beneath a moonless sky.

🪩 Quick Taglines

“When the world errors, you become the patch.”

“No moon. No guidance. No one else.”

“Decode the Circuit. Survive the glitch.”

## KNOWN BUGS 

![This bug is common when you launch the modpack, so, you click in "Back to Title Screen", next, open a world, this will happen when you launch the modpack again, this is common.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52825b8b61c4c176ab15c6caea497c1f909f44bb.png)
